title: Biodiversity
definition: The variety of life at genetic, species, and ecosystem levels.

difficulty_levels.beginner: Different kinds of plants, animals, and microorganisms that make up our planet's living world.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: The richness and variability of life forms within ecosystems, from genetic differences among individuals to diversity among species and habitats.
difficulty_levels.expert: A measure of the totality of genes, species, and ecosystems on Earth, including extinction rates, threats to biodiversity, conservation efforts, and societal impacts of biodiversity loss.

extra_fields.insight: The importance of preserving biodiversity for a healthy planet.
